commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=cbf03ddb1189a085dab06974613604c634f40aff)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an early `response.status === "cancelled"` return in `handleResponseDone` and a regression test for cancelled `response.done` tool outputs.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main enables `interrupt_response` and `handleResponseDone` processes `response.output` without checking `response.status`, so a cancelled `response.done` carrying function calls will reach the tool handlers. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human follow-up is needed because the external proof gate cannot be satisfied by an automated repair lane, and maintainers should also ask for the small test assertion correction.

target.title: fix(server): skip tool execution for cancelled responses
target.body:
## Summary

- `handleResponseDone` never checked `response.status`. With `turn_detection.interrupt_response: true`, a barge-in can cancel a response that's still mid function-call generation — but the cancelled `response.done` event can still carry a completed `function_call` in `output`. Previously this would still run `query_agent`/`save_call_report` and queue a follow-up `response.create`, making the bot act and speak right after being interrupted.
- Fix: `handleResponseDone` now returns early when `response.status === "cancelled"`, skipping all tool execution and follow-up responses for that response.

## Test plan

- [x] New regression test `test/server-cancelled-response.test.ts`: emits a `response.done` with `status: "cancelled"` and completed `query_agent`/`save_call_report` function calls, asserts no `conversation.item.create`, no `response.create`, and no `report.json` is written.
- [x] `pnpm test` — 46/46 pass
- [x] `pnpm run lint` and `pnpm run typecheck` clean
target.author: joevenner

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
